rules.summary: A non-browser process opened or modified Chromium-family Local State files that can contain encrypted key metadata for browser credential stores.
rules.summaryZh: 非浏览器进程打开或修改 Chromium 系 Local State 文件，其中可能包含浏览器凭据库加密密钥元数据。

rules.title: Non-browser access to Chromium cookie database
rules.titleZh: 非浏览器访问 Chromium Cookie 数据库
rules.summary: A non-browser process touched Chromium-family Cookie database paths that can contain reusable web session tokens.
rules.summaryZh: 非浏览器进程触及 Chromium 系 Cookie 数据库路径，其中可能包含可复用 Web 会话令牌。

rules.title: Defender service disabled in registry
rules.titleZh: 注册表禁用 Defender 服务
rules.summary: A registry write set WinDefend, WdNisSvc, or Sense service Start values to the disabled service-start value.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表写入将 WinDefend、WdNisSvc 或 Sense 服务的 Start 值设置为禁用服务启动值。

rules.title: Defender real-time protection disabled value
rules.titleZh: Defender 实时防护禁用值
rules.summary: A Defender policy registry write set protection-disable values to enabled/true, reducing real-time, behavior, IOAV, or script scanning coverage.
rules.summaryZh: Defender 策略注册表写入将禁用防护类值设置为启用/true，降低实时、行为、IOAV 或脚本扫描覆盖。

rules.title: Defender exclusion for user-writable path
rules.titleZh: Defender 用户可写路径排除项
rules.summary: A Defender exclusion registry write targeted Temp, AppData, Public, ProgramData, Downloads, or equivalent user-writable staging paths.
rules.summaryZh: Defender 排除项注册表写入指向 Temp、AppData、Public、ProgramData、Downloads 或等价用户可写暂存路径。

rules.title: PowerShell security logging disabled
rules.titleZh: PowerShell 安全日志被禁用
rules.summary: A registry write disabled PowerShell ScriptBlock, Module, or Transcription logging through policy values.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表写入通过策略值禁用 PowerShell ScriptBlock、Module 或 Transcription 日志。

rules.title: UAC policy weakened in registry
rules.titleZh: 注册表削弱 UAC 策略
rules.summary: A registry write weakened UAC prompts or secure desktop behavior by setting known risky Policies\System values.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表写入设置已知高风险的 Policies\System 值，削弱 UAC 提示或安全桌面行为。

rules.title: Remote UAC token filtering disabled
rules.titleZh: 远程 UAC 令牌过滤被禁用
rules.summary: A registry write enabled LocalAccountTokenFilterPolicy, allowing local administrator accounts to receive full tokens over remote connections.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表写入启用 LocalAccountTokenFilterPolicy，使本地管理员账户可通过远程连接获得完整令牌。

rules.title: SilentCleanup UAC environment hijack
rules.titleZh: SilentCleanup UAC 环境变量劫持
rules.summary: A registry write set the user windir environment value to a shell, script interpreter, LOLBin, or executable payload used by SilentCleanup UAC bypass chains.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表写入将用户 windir 环境变量设置为 shell、脚本解释器、LOLBin 或可执行载荷，可用于 SilentCleanup UAC 绕过链。

rules.title: Office macro security weakened
rules.titleZh: Office 宏安全被削弱
rules.summary: An Office Security registry write enabled risky macro, VBA object model, or Protected View bypass settings.
rules.summaryZh: Office Security 注册表写入启用高风险宏、VBA 对象模型访问或 Protected View 绕过设置。

rules.title: Outlook form or homepage persistence
rules.titleZh: Outlook 表单或主页持久化
rules.summary: An Outlook registry write referenced custom forms, web views, home pages, or script-capable URLs used for Office persistence.
rules.summaryZh: Outlook 注册表写入引用自定义表单、Web View、主页或可执行脚本的 URL，可用于 Office 持久化。

rules.title: Browser extension force-install policy
rules.titleZh: 浏览器扩展强制安装策略
rules.summary: A browser policy registry write configured forced extension installation, extension settings, update URLs, or CRX-related metadata.
rules.summaryZh: 浏览器策略注册表写入配置强制扩展安装、扩展设置、update URL 或 CRX 相关元数据。

rules.title: Browser native messaging host registry
rules.titleZh: 浏览器 Native Messaging Host 注册表
rules.summary: A registry write registered a browser Native Messaging Host manifest pointing at user-writable script or executable content.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表写入注册浏览器 Native Messaging Host 清单，并指向用户可写脚本或可执行内容。

rules.title: Browser native messaging host manifest file
rules.titleZh: 浏览器 Native Messaging Host 清单文件
rules.summary: A file write created or modified a Native Messaging Host manifest outside sandbox plumbing paths.
rules.summaryZh: 文件写入创建或修改 Native Messaging Host 清单，且不位于沙箱管道路径。

rules.title: IE Browser Helper Object user-writable payload
rules.titleZh: IE BHO 用户可写载荷
rules.summary: A registry write touched Browser Helper Object, toolbar, or URLSearchHooks paths with user-writable or script-capable payload evidence.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表写入触及 BHO、工具栏或 URLSearchHooks 路径，并包含用户可写或脚本型载荷证据。

rules.title: WinRM remote management enabled
rules.titleZh: 启用 WinRM 远程管理
rules.summary: A command line explicitly enabled PowerShell remoting or WinRM remote management, often preparatory to lateral movement.
rules.summaryZh: 命令行明确启用 PowerShell Remoting 或 WinRM 远程管理，常作为横向移动准备步骤。

rules.title: TLS SNI uses dynamic DNS or onion domain
rules.titleZh: TLS SNI 使用动态 DNS 或 Onion 域名
rules.summary: TLS metadata exposed SNI/serverName values using onion or common dynamic-DNS domains associated with evasive or commodity C2 infrastructure.
rules.summaryZh: TLS 元数据暴露的 SNI/serverName 使用 onion 或常见动态 DNS 域名，常见于规避性或通用 C2 基础设施。

rules.title: HTTP POST with credential or token material
rules.titleZh: HTTP POST 携带凭据或令牌材料
rules.summary: HTTP metadata combined POST with authorization, cookie, bearer token, password, or session-token fields, a constrained web credential exfiltration signal.
rules.summaryZh: HTTP 元数据同时包含 POST 与 authorization、cookie、bearer token、password 或 session-token 字段，是受约束的 Web 凭据外传信号。

rules.title: PowerShell encoded command with base64 payload
rules.titleZh: PowerShell EncodedCommand 携带 Base64 负载
rules.summary: A process command line matched a timeout-bounded regex for PowerShell or pwsh EncodedCommand with a base64-looking payload.
rules.summaryZh: 进程命令行匹配 PowerShell 或 pwsh EncodedCommand 与类似 Base64 负载的正则特征。

rules.title: PowerShell script block disables AMSI
rules.titleZh: PowerShell 脚本块禁用 AMSI
rules.summary: Script block text contained both AmsiUtils and amsiInitFailed, using same-field AND matching to avoid single-token false positives.
rules.summaryZh: 脚本块文本同时包含 AmsiUtils 与 amsiInitFailed，使用同字段 AND 避免单个令牌误报。

rules.title: WMIC shadow copy deletion command
rules.titleZh: WMIC 删除卷影副本命令
rules.summary: The command line contains WMIC, shadowcopy, and delete in the same field, a recovery-inhibition ransomware behavior.
rules.summaryZh: 同一命令行字段同时包含 WMIC、shadowcopy 与 delete，是勒索软件抑制恢复的行为。

rules.title: Windows event log clearing command
rules.titleZh: Windows 事件日志清除命令
rules.summary: A command line matched wevtutil log clearing syntax for Security, System, Application, or Windows provider logs.
rules.summaryZh: 命令行匹配 wevtutil 清除 Security、System、Application 或 Windows provider 日志的语法。

rules.title: Boot recovery policy disables recovery prompts
rules.titleZh: 启动恢复策略禁用恢复提示
rules.summary: A bcdedit command configured bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures, a common recovery-inhibition companion to destructive or ransomware behavior.
rules.summaryZh: bcdedit 命令配置 bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures，常见于破坏或勒索行为中的恢复抑制。

rules.title: Outbound SMB/admin-share port observed
rules.titleZh: 观察到出站 SMB/管理共享端口
rules.summary: Network metadata reported TCP port 445 using numeric range predicates, indicating possible SMB staging or admin-share lateral movement.
rules.summaryZh: 网络元数据通过数值范围谓词报告 TCP 445 端口，可能表示 SMB 投递或管理共享横向移动。

rules.title: Outbound RDP port observed
rules.titleZh: 观察到出站 RDP 端口
rules.summary: Network metadata reported TCP port 3389 using numeric range predicates, indicating possible Remote Desktop lateral movement or discovery.
rules.summaryZh: 网络元数据通过数值范围谓词报告 TCP 3389 端口，可能表示远程桌面横向移动或发现。

rules.title: Outbound WinRM port observed
rules.titleZh: 观察到出站 WinRM 端口
rules.summary: Network metadata reported WinRM ports 5985 or 5986 using numeric range predicates.
rules.summaryZh: 网络元数据通过数值范围谓词报告 WinRM 5985 或 5986 端口。

rules.title: Local Tor/SOCKS listener port opened
rules.titleZh: 本地 Tor/SOCKS 监听端口打开
rules.summary: Listener metadata reported common Tor/SOCKS ports 9050 or 9150 using numeric range predicates.
rules.summaryZh: 监听器元数据通过数值范围谓词报告常见 Tor/SOCKS 9050 或 9150 端口。

rules.title: Large HTTP POST upload observed
rules.titleZh: 观察到大体量 HTTP POST 上传
rules.summary: HTTP metadata combined POST with a large upload/request-body byte count using numeric ranges, a constrained exfiltration indicator.
rules.summaryZh: HTTP 元数据同时包含 POST 与较大上传/请求体字节数，是受约束的外传指标。

rules.title: Very long NXDOMAIN DNS query
rules.titleZh: 超长 NXDOMAIN DNS 查询
rules.summary: DNS metadata reported a very long query name with NXDOMAIN or DGA/tunnel classification using numeric and regex predicates.
rules.summaryZh: DNS 元数据通过数值与正则谓词报告超长查询名以及 NXDOMAIN 或 DGA/隧道分类。

rules.title: Long sleep duration requested
rules.titleZh: 请求长时间休眠
rules.summary: Sleep or timeout metadata requested at least five minutes using numeric range predicates, a common sandbox-evasion delay.
rules.summaryZh: 休眠或超时元数据通过数值范围谓词显示请求至少五分钟延迟，是常见沙箱规避方式。

rules.title: Process tree spawned many children
rules.titleZh: 进程树产生大量子进程
rules.summary: Process-tree metadata reported at least 20 child processes using an all-field numeric range predicate.
rules.summaryZh: 进程树元数据通过全字段数值范围谓词报告至少 20 个子进程。

rules.title: Mass file-write burst with encryption classification
rules.titleZh: 带加密分类的大量文件写入突增
rules.summary: File activity metadata reported at least 100 writes plus ransomware/encryption classification or encrypted extension evidence.
rules.summaryZh: 文件活动元数据报告至少 100 次写入，并带有勒索/加密分类或加密扩展名证据。

rules.title: Mass registry Run-key change burst
rules.titleZh: 大量 Run 键注册表变更突增
rules.summary: Registry activity metadata reported at least 50 set operations and Run/RunOnce or persistence scope evidence.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表活动元数据报告至少 50 次设置操作，并带有 Run/RunOnce 或持久化范围证据。

rules.title: HTTP request to direct IP without User-Agent
rules.titleZh: 无 User-Agent 的直连 IP HTTP 请求
rules.summary: HTTP metadata used an IPv4 literal host and omitted userAgent, combining regex and not-exists predicates for suspicious automation.
rules.summaryZh: HTTP 元数据使用 IPv4 字面量主机且缺少 userAgent，结合正则与不存在谓词识别可疑自动化流量。

rules.title: TLS JA3 observed without SNI
rules.titleZh: TLS JA3 存在但缺少 SNI
rules.summary: TLS metadata contained a JA3 hash but no sni/serverName fields, using all-regex plus not-exists predicates for suspicious TLS automation.
rules.summaryZh: TLS 元数据包含 JA3 哈希但缺少 sni/serverName 字段，使用全字段正则与不存在谓词识别可疑 TLS 自动化。

rules.title: Downloaded file executed from user-writable path without referrer
rules.titleZh: 无 Referrer 的用户可写路径下载执行
rules.summary: A download-execute correlation row included both paths, the executed path was user-writable, and browser/referrer context was absent.
rules.summaryZh: 下载执行关联行同时包含下载与执行路径，执行路径位于用户可写目录且缺少浏览器/referrer 上下文。

rules.title: HTTP URI contains API gate and bot identifier
rules.titleZh: HTTP URI 同时包含 API gate 与 Bot 标识
rules.summary: HTTP URI contained both /api/ and gate plus an id-like query parameter in the same field, a constrained C2 gate pattern.
rules.summaryZh: HTTP URI 同一字段同时包含 /api/ 与 gate，并含类似 id 的查询参数，是受约束的 C2 gate 模式。

rules.title: Chromium cookie database accessed by non-browser process
rules.titleZh: 非浏览器进程访问 Chromium Cookie 数据库
rules.summary: A file event path matched Chromium-family Network\Cookies databases while common browser process names were excluded.
rules.summaryZh: 文件事件路径匹配 Chromium 系 Network\Cookies 数据库，同时排除了常见浏览器进程名。

rules.title: NTDS database file path accessed
rules.titleZh: 访问 NTDS 数据库文件路径
rules.summary: A file event path matched the domain controller NTDS.dit credential database path.
rules.summaryZh: 文件事件路径匹配域控 NTDS.dit 凭据数据库路径。

rules.title: LSASS dump-like file created
rules.titleZh: 创建类似 LSASS 转储的文件
rules.summary: A created or copied artifact path looked like an LSASS/comsvcs memory dump outside sandbox collection paths.
rules.summaryZh: 创建或复制的工件路径看起来像 LSASS/comsvcs 内存转储，并排除沙箱采集路径。

rules.title: Service ImagePath points to user-writable payload
rules.titleZh: 服务 ImagePath 指向用户可写负载
rules.summary: A service registry change used a user-writable executable/script path in ImagePath or value data, matched by regex.
rules.summaryZh: 服务注册表变更在 ImagePath 或 value 数据中使用用户可写的可执行/脚本路径，由正则匹配。

rules.title: Scheduled task launches user-writable payload
rules.titleZh: 计划任务启动用户可写负载
rules.summary: Scheduled-task metadata or TaskCache data referenced a user-writable executable/script payload path matched by regex.
rules.summaryZh: 计划任务元数据或 TaskCache 数据引用用户可写的可执行/脚本负载路径，由正则匹配。

rules.title: Run-key persistence points to dropped payload
rules.titleZh: Run 键持久化指向投放负载
rules.summary: A Run or RunOnce registry write points to a user-writable executable/script payload and carries dropped-file or download-execute correlation context.
rules.summaryZh: Run 或 RunOnce 注册表写入指向用户可写位置的可执行/脚本负载，并带有投放文件或下载执行关联上下文。

rules.title: Defender exclusion added for dropped payload path
rules.titleZh: 为投放负载路径添加 Defender 排除项
rules.summary: A Defender exclusion registry write targets a user-writable payload path and includes dropped-file or download-execute correlation evidence.
rules.summaryZh: Defender 排除项注册表写入指向用户可写负载路径，并包含投放文件或下载执行关联证据。

rules.title: Security-tool discovery through process listing
rules.titleZh: 通过进程列表发现安全工具
rules.summary: A command lists running processes and filters for security, EDR, packet-capture, VM, or analysis-tool process names in the same command line.
rules.summaryZh: 命令行在列举运行进程的同时筛选安全、EDR、抓包、虚拟机或分析工具进程名。

rules.title: Credential-themed file search in user profile
rules.titleZh: 在用户配置文件中搜索凭据相关文件
rules.summary: A file-search command combines a user-profile scope with credential, secret, token, wallet, key, or KeePass-like filename terms.
rules.summaryZh: 文件搜索命令同时包含用户配置文件范围以及凭据、密钥、令牌、钱包、私钥或 KeePass 类文件名关键词。

rules.title: User-writable payload shows periodic C2 flow
rules.titleZh: 用户可写负载出现周期性 C2 流量
rules.summary: Network-flow metadata ties a user-writable payload process to a periodic beacon interval, bounded jitter, destination IP, and explicit C2/beacon classification.
rules.summaryZh: 网络流元数据将用户可写负载进程与周期性 beacon 间隔、有限抖动、目标 IP 和明确 C2/beacon 分类关联起来。

rules.title: Sandbox check paired with long sleep gate
rules.titleZh: 沙箱检查与长时间休眠门控组合
rules.summary: Anti-analysis telemetry combines VM/sandbox check text with a long sleep duration, indicating a sandbox gate rather than a standalone timeout.
rules.summaryZh: 反分析遥测同时包含 VM/沙箱检查文本和长时间休眠，表明这是沙箱门控而非单独超时。

rules.title: Dropped-file artifact from script download
rules.titleZh: 脚本下载产生的投放文件工件
rules.summary: Dropped-file artifact metadata ties a user-writable executable/script source path to a script or LOLBin downloader process and an HTTP(S) source URL.
rules.summaryZh: 投放文件工件元数据将用户可写的可执行/脚本源路径与脚本或 LOLBin 下载进程以及 HTTP(S) 来源 URL 关联起来。

rules.title: Odbcconf REGSVR proxy execution from user-writable DLL
rules.titleZh: Odbcconf 从用户可写 DLL 代理执行 REGSVR
rules.summary: A process command line used odbcconf.exe REGSVR syntax with a DLL under a user-writable path, matching a constrained LOLBin proxy-execution pattern.
rules.summaryZh: 进程命令行使用 odbcconf.exe REGSVR 语法并指向用户可写路径下的 DLL，是受约束的 LOLBin 代理执行模式。

rules.title: MMC loads user-writable MSC snap-in
rules.titleZh: MMC 加载用户可写 MSC 管理单元
rules.summary: A process command line launched mmc.exe with an .msc file under a user-writable path, a constrained System Binary Proxy Execution signal.
rules.summaryZh: 进程命令行启动 mmc.exe 并加载用户可写路径下的 .msc 文件，是受约束的系统二进制代理执行信号。

rules.title: Named-pipe client impersonation API observed
rules.titleZh: 观察到命名管道客户端模拟 API
rules.summary: API or named-pipe telemetry reported ImpersonateNamedPipeClient/RpcImpersonateClient with a pipe name, a high-signal token impersonation pattern when emitted by API monitors.
rules.summaryZh: API 或命名管道遥测报告 ImpersonateNamedPipeClient/RpcImpersonateClient 且包含管道名；当由 API 监控产生时，这是高信号的令牌模拟模式。

rules.title: LSA authentication package persistence registry value
rules.titleZh: LSA 身份验证包持久化注册表值
rules.summary: A registry modification targeted LSA Authentication Packages, Security Packages, or Notification Packages, which can load attacker-controlled DLLs during logon.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表修改指向 LSA Authentication Packages、Security Packages 或 Notification Packages，可能在登录期间加载攻击者控制的 DLL。

rules.title: AppInit DLLs persistence registry value
rules.titleZh: AppInit DLLs 持久化注册表值
rules.summary: A registry write targeted AppInit_DLLs or LoadAppInit_DLLs, an application initialization DLL loading persistence mechanism.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表写入指向 AppInit_DLLs 或 LoadAppInit_DLLs，这是应用初始化 DLL 加载类持久化机制。

rules.title: AppCert DLLs registry persistence
rules.titleZh: AppCert DLLs 注册表持久化
rules.summary: A registry modification targeted AppCertDlls, which can force DLL loading into processes that call CreateProcess-family APIs.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表修改指向 AppCertDlls，可在进程调用 CreateProcess 系列 API 时强制加载 DLL。

rules.title: BootExecute registry persistence modified
rules.titleZh: BootExecute 注册表持久化被修改
rules.summary: A registry write targeted Session Manager BootExecute, which can execute native images during boot before normal user-mode startup.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表写入指向 Session Manager BootExecute，可能在正常用户态启动前的引导阶段执行原生映像。

rules.title: Windows Time Provider DLL persistence
rules.titleZh: Windows Time Provider DLL 持久化
rules.summary: A registry modification targeted W32Time TimeProviders DLL or Enabled values, a service-loaded DLL persistence mechanism.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表修改指向 W32Time TimeProviders 的 DLL 或 Enabled 值，这是由服务加载 DLL 的持久化机制。

rules.title: WMI permanent event subscription persistence
rules.titleZh: WMI 永久事件订阅持久化
rules.summary: Telemetry reported creation of WMI EventFilter, EventConsumer, FilterToConsumerBinding, or a repository write associated with permanent WMI subscription persistence.
rules.summaryZh: 遥测报告创建 WMI EventFilter、EventConsumer、FilterToConsumerBinding，或与永久 WMI 订阅持久化相关的存储库写入。

rules.title: COM InprocServer32 hijack points to user-writable path
rules.titleZh: COM InprocServer32 劫持指向用户可写路径
rules.summary: A registry write under CLSID InprocServer32 points a COM server DLL to AppData, Temp, ProgramData, Public, or Downloads.
rules.summaryZh: CLSID InprocServer32 下的注册表写入将 COM 服务端 DLL 指向 AppData、Temp、ProgramData、Public 或 Downloads。

rules.title: Print monitor DLL persistence registry value
rules.titleZh: 打印监视器 DLL 持久化注册表值
rules.summary: A registry write targeted Print Monitors Driver values, which can load a monitor DLL through the print spooler service.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表写入指向 Print Monitors Driver 值，可通过打印后台处理程序服务加载监视器 DLL。

rules.title: Active Setup StubPath persistence
rules.titleZh: Active Setup StubPath 持久化
rules.summary: A registry write targeted Active Setup StubPath, which can run commands when users log on.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表写入指向 Active Setup StubPath，可能在用户登录时运行命令。

rules.title: R0 cross-process virtual memory write
rules.titleZh: R0 跨进程虚拟内存写入
rules.summary: Kernel or normalized process telemetry reported a cross-process virtual memory write such as WriteProcessMemory or NtWriteVirtualMemory.
rules.summaryZh: 内核或规范化进程遥测报告跨进程虚拟内存写入，例如 WriteProcessMemory 或 NtWriteVirtualMemory。

rules.title: R0 remote thread creation primitive
rules.titleZh: R0 远程线程创建原语
rules.summary: Kernel or API telemetry reported remote thread creation through CreateRemoteThread, NtCreateThreadEx, RtlCreateUserThread, or a driver thread event.
rules.summaryZh: 内核或 API 遥测报告通过 CreateRemoteThread、NtCreateThreadEx、RtlCreateUserThread 或驱动线程事件创建远程线程。

rules.title: Remote APC queue injection primitive
rules.titleZh: 远程 APC 队列注入原语
rules.summary: API or thread telemetry reported QueueUserAPC/NtQueueApcThread against another process or thread, a common APC injection primitive.
rules.summaryZh: API 或线程遥测报告对其他进程或线程调用 QueueUserAPC/NtQueueApcThread，这是常见 APC 注入原语。
rules.mitreTechniqueName: Create or Modify System Process: APC Injection

rules.title: Executable section mapped into remote process
rules.titleZh: 可执行节映射到远程进程
rules.summary: Memory telemetry reported section creation or MapViewOfSection with executable protection in a remote process.
rules.summaryZh: 内存遥测报告在远程进程中创建节或 MapViewOfSection，并具有可执行保护。

rules.title: Suspended process hollowing sequence metadata
rules.titleZh: 挂起进程空洞化序列元数据
rules.summary: Telemetry reported suspended process creation combined with unmap, write, context, or resume operations associated with process hollowing.
rules.summaryZh: 遥测报告挂起进程创建，并伴随 unmap、write、context 或 resume 等进程空洞化相关操作。

rules.title: High access handle opened to LSASS
rules.titleZh: 对 LSASS 打开高权限句柄
rules.summary: Process access telemetry reported a high-rights handle to lsass.exe, often preceding credential theft or injection.
rules.summaryZh: 进程访问遥测报告对 lsass.exe 打开高权限句柄，常见于凭据窃取或注入之前。

rules.title: Executable copied to administrative share
rules.titleZh: 可执行文件复制到管理共享
rules.summary: File telemetry reported creation of an executable, DLL, script, or service binary on an administrative share path such as ADMIN$, C$, or IPC$.
rules.summaryZh: 文件遥测报告在 ADMIN$、C$ 或 IPC$ 等管理共享路径上创建可执行文件、DLL、脚本或服务二进制。

rules.title: PsExec-style remote service ImagePath
rules.titleZh: PsExec 风格远程服务 ImagePath
rules.summary: A service registry ImagePath value referenced common PsExec or remote execution service names and staging paths.
rules.summaryZh: 服务注册表 ImagePath 值引用了常见 PsExec 或远程执行服务名称和暂存路径。

rules.title: WinRM or PowerShell remoting target specified
rules.titleZh: 指定 WinRM 或 PowerShell 远程目标
rules.summary: A command line invoked WinRM, Enter-PSSession, Invoke-Command, or PowerShell remoting with an explicit remote computer name.
rules.summaryZh: 命令行调用 WinRM、Enter-PSSession、Invoke-Command 或 PowerShell Remoting，并指定远程计算机名。

rules.title: Remote WMI process creation command
rules.titleZh: 远程 WMI 进程创建命令
rules.summary: A command line used WMIC process call create or PowerShell CIM/WMI invocation against a remote node.
rules.summaryZh: 命令行使用 WMIC process call create 或 PowerShell CIM/WMI 调用远程节点。

rules.title: RDP shadow or RestrictedAdmin command
rules.titleZh: RDP Shadow 或 RestrictedAdmin 命令
rules.summary: A command line enabled or invoked RDP shadowing, RestrictedAdmin, or mstsc remote desktop connection behavior.
rules.summaryZh: 命令行启用或调用 RDP Shadow、RestrictedAdmin 或 mstsc 远程桌面连接行为。

rules.title: CPUID hypervisor or vendor check observed
rules.titleZh: 检测到 CPUID Hypervisor 或厂商检查
rules.summary: API, R0, or anti-analysis telemetry reported CPUID hypervisor bit or VM vendor checks.
rules.summaryZh: API、R0 或反分析遥测报告 CPUID hypervisor 位或虚拟机厂商检查。

rules.title: VM artifact registry query
rules.titleZh: 虚拟机痕迹注册表查询
rules.summary: Registry telemetry reported queries for VMware, VirtualBox, Hyper-V, QEMU, or sandbox artifact keys.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表遥测报告查询 VMware、VirtualBox、Hyper-V、QEMU 或沙箱痕迹键。

rules.title: Analysis tool process discovery
rules.titleZh: 分析工具进程发现
rules.summary: Process discovery telemetry or command line referenced common analysis, debugger, VM, or sandbox tool process names.
rules.summaryZh: 进程发现遥测或命令行引用常见分析、调试器、虚拟机或沙箱工具进程名。

rules.title: Long sleep or time-skew anti-sandbox check
rules.titleZh: 长时间休眠或时间偏移反沙箱检查
rules.summary: Telemetry reported a long sleep, accelerated sleep detection, GetTickCount timing check, or time-skew comparison used to evade sandboxes.
rules.summaryZh: 遥测报告长时间休眠、休眠加速检测、GetTickCount 计时检查或时间偏移比较，用于规避沙箱。

rules.title: Certutil URL cache download command
rules.titleZh: Certutil URL cache 下载命令
rules.summary: A command line used certutil URL cache or split options to download a remote payload.
rules.summaryZh: 命令行使用 certutil URL cache 或 split 参数下载远程载荷。

rules.title: BITSAdmin transfer download command
rules.titleZh: BITSAdmin 传输下载命令
rules.summary: A command line used bitsadmin transfer, create, addfile, or resume to fetch content from HTTP or HTTPS.
rules.summaryZh: 命令行使用 bitsadmin transfer、create、addfile 或 resume 从 HTTP/HTTPS 获取内容。

rules.title: PowerShell download to user-writable path
rules.titleZh: PowerShell 下载到用户可写路径
rules.summary: A PowerShell command downloaded remote content and referenced AppData, Temp, ProgramData, Public, or Downloads as a staging path.
rules.summaryZh: PowerShell 命令下载远程内容，并引用 AppData、Temp、ProgramData、Public 或 Downloads 作为暂存路径。

rules.title: MSHTA or Regsvr32 remote scriptlet execution
rules.titleZh: MSHTA 或 Regsvr32 远程脚本执行
rules.summary: A command line launched mshta or regsvr32 with an HTTP(S) URL or scriptlet directive, enabling download-and-execute without writing a conventional executable first.
rules.summaryZh: 命令行使用 HTTP(S) URL 或 scriptlet 指令启动 mshta/regsvr32，可在不先写入常规可执行文件的情况下下载并执行。

rules.title: Rundll32 executes DLL from URL or web cache
rules.titleZh: Rundll32 从 URL 或 Web 缓存执行 DLL
rules.summary: A rundll32 command line referenced an HTTP(S) URL, INetCache, Content.IE5, or a user-writable DLL path.
rules.summaryZh: rundll32 命令行引用 HTTP(S) URL、INetCache、Content.IE5 或用户可写 DLL 路径。

rules.title: PCAP DNS TXT long-label exfiltration pattern
rules.titleZh: PCAP DNS TXT 长标签外传模式
rules.summary: DNS or PCAP telemetry reported TXT queries or long encoded labels commonly associated with DNS tunneling or exfiltration.
rules.summaryZh: DNS 或 PCAP 遥测报告 TXT 查询或长编码标签，常见于 DNS 隧道或外传。

rules.title: PCAP DNS NXDOMAIN burst or DGA metadata
rules.titleZh: PCAP DNS NXDOMAIN 突发或 DGA 元数据
rules.summary: DNS telemetry reported NXDOMAIN responses, DGA classification, high entropy, or an elevated unique-domain count.
rules.summaryZh: DNS 遥测报告 NXDOMAIN 响应、DGA 分类、高熵或较高唯一域名数量。

rules.title: HTTP executable download by content metadata
rules.titleZh: 基于内容元数据的 HTTP 可执行下载
rules.summary: HTTP or PCAP telemetry reported executable, DLL, script, MSI, or PE magic content in an HTTP response.
rules.summaryZh: HTTP 或 PCAP 遥测在 HTTP 响应中报告可执行文件、DLL、脚本、MSI 或 PE 魔数内容。

rules.title: HTTP POST beacon with periodic small payload metadata
rules.titleZh: HTTP POST 周期性小载荷 Beacon 元数据
rules.summary: HTTP or PCAP metadata reported POST requests with beacon, periodicity, small body, or C2 classification fields.
rules.summaryZh: HTTP 或 PCAP 元数据报告 POST 请求，并带有 beacon、周期性、小请求体或 C2 分类字段。

rules.title: HTTP Host header IP literal or suspicious TLD
rules.titleZh: HTTP Host 头为 IP 字面量或可疑 TLD
rules.summary: HTTP metadata reported a Host header using an IP literal, dynamic DNS provider, or suspicious low-reputation TLD.
rules.summaryZh: HTTP 元数据报告 Host 头使用 IP 字面量、动态 DNS 提供商或可疑低信誉 TLD。

rules.title: TLS self-signed or invalid certificate metadata
rules.titleZh: TLS 自签名或无效证书元数据
rules.summary: TLS or PCAP metadata reported a self-signed, expired, invalid, or untrusted certificate.
rules.summaryZh: TLS 或 PCAP 元数据报告自签名、过期、无效或不受信任证书。

rules.title: TLS SNI IP literal or DGA-like hostname
rules.titleZh: TLS SNI 为 IP 字面量或 DGA 风格主机名
rules.summary: TLS metadata reported SNI as an IP literal, high-entropy hostname, dynamic DNS domain, or DGA classification.
rules.summaryZh: TLS 元数据报告 SNI 为 IP 字面量、高熵主机名、动态 DNS 域名或 DGA 分类。

rules.title: TLS no-SNI connection with rare JA3 metadata
rules.titleZh: 无 SNI 且 JA3 罕见的 TLS 连接
rules.summary: TLS metadata reported a missing SNI combined with rare JA3, unusual ALPN, or C2 classification fields.
rules.summaryZh: TLS 元数据报告缺失 SNI，并伴随罕见 JA3、异常 ALPN 或 C2 分类字段。

rules.title: PCAP SMB admin-share session metadata
rules.titleZh: PCAP SMB 管理共享会话元数据
rules.summary: SMB or PCAP flow metadata reported session setup, tree connect, or named pipe access to ADMIN$, C$, IPC$, svcctl, samr, or winreg.
rules.summaryZh: SMB 或 PCAP 流元数据报告对 ADMIN$、C$、IPC$、svcctl、samr 或 winreg 的会话建立、树连接或命名管道访问。

rules.title: Scheduled task logon/start trigger with user-writable payload
rules.titleZh: 计划任务登录/启动触发用户可写载荷
rules.summary: A schtasks command created a logon, startup, idle, minute, or daily task whose action points to an executable or script in a user-writable staging path.
rules.summaryZh: schtasks 命令创建登录、启动、空闲、分钟或每日触发的任务，动作指向用户可写可执行/脚本载荷；排查任务名、触发器和目标路径。

rules.title: Scheduled task RunLevel highest with user-writable action
rules.titleZh: 计划任务最高权限运行用户可写动作
rules.summary: Scheduled-task telemetry set RunLevel highest while the task action points to a user-writable executable or script path.
rules.summaryZh: 计划任务遥测设置最高权限运行，同时动作指向用户可写可执行/脚本路径；排查是否借任务提权或持久化。

rules.title: App Paths registry hijack to user-writable executable
rules.titleZh: App Paths 注册表劫持到用户可写可执行文件
rules.summary: A registry write under Microsoft Windows CurrentVersion App Paths points an executable resolution entry to a user-writable path.
rules.summaryZh: Microsoft Windows CurrentVersion App Paths 下的注册表写入把可执行解析项指向用户可写路径；排查是否通过应用路径劫持实现持久化或代理执行。

rules.title: Netsh helper DLL persistence registry value
rules.titleZh: Netsh Helper DLL 持久化注册表值
rules.summary: A registry write registered a Netsh helper DLL, especially when the DLL path is user-writable or newly dropped.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表写入注册了 Netsh helper DLL，尤其是 DLL 位于用户可写或新投放路径；排查 DLL 来源、签名和关联进程。

rules.title: Direct syscall or NTDLL unhooking injection evidence
rules.titleZh: Direct syscall 或 NTDLL 反 Hook 注入证据
rules.summary: API, memory, or driver process telemetry reported direct-syscall, syscall-stub, SysWhispers, HellsGate/HalosGate, or NTDLL unhooking evidence used to bypass user-mode monitoring before injection.
rules.summaryZh: API、内存或驱动进程遥测报告 direct syscall、syscall stub、SysWhispers、HellsGate/HalosGate 或 NTDLL 反 Hook 证据，常用于绕过用户态监控后执行注入；优先查看目标进程和后续远程写/线程事件。

rules.title: Process doppelgänging or transacted-section injection primitive
rules.titleZh: 进程 Doppelgänging 或事务 Section 注入原语
rules.summary: API or memory telemetry reported transacted file/section primitives such as NtCreateTransaction, CreateFileTransacted, TxF, rollback, or doppelgänging labels.
rules.summaryZh: API 或内存遥测报告 NtCreateTransaction、CreateFileTransacted、TxF、rollback 或 doppelgänging 等事务文件/Section 原语；排查是否随后创建挂起进程或映射可执行 Section。

operation: process doppelg[aä]nging|transacted section|TxF|transaction rollback|rollback section|transacted hollowing
operationName: process doppelg[aä]nging|transacted section|TxF|transaction rollback|rollback section|transacted hollowing

rules.title: Virtual-memory write into sensitive Windows process
rules.titleZh: 向敏感 Windows 进程写入虚拟内存
rules.summary: Process, API, or driver telemetry reported a virtual-memory write, allocation, or section map targeting LSASS, Winlogon, Services, CSRSS, Explorer, or a similar sensitive process.
rules.summaryZh: 进程、API 或驱动遥测报告对 LSASS、Winlogon、Services、CSRSS、Explorer 等敏感进程执行虚拟内存写入、分配或 Section 映射；这是高优先级注入/凭据访问证据。

operation: VM_WRITE|virtual memory write|cross-process write|remote allocation|section map|write_memory
operationName: VM_WRITE|virtual memory write|cross-process write|remote allocation|section map|write_memory

rules.title: Executable copied to remote admin share
rules.titleZh: 可执行文件复制到远程管理共享
rules.summary: A command line used copy, xcopy, robocopy, or PowerShell copy semantics to stage an executable/script payload into a remote ADMIN$, C$, or IPC$ style share.
rules.summaryZh: 命令行使用 copy、xcopy、robocopy 或 PowerShell Copy-Item 将可执行/脚本载荷投放到远程 ADMIN$、C$ 或 IPC$ 管理共享；排查目标主机和后续服务/计划任务执行。

rules.title: Remote service creation using admin-share binary path
rules.titleZh: 远程服务创建引用管理共享载荷
rules.summary: A command line created or configured a remote service via sc.exe while the service binary path references an admin-share, UNC, or user-writable payload.
rules.summaryZh: 命令行通过 sc.exe 创建或配置远程服务，服务二进制路径引用管理共享、UNC 或用户可写载荷；排查服务名、目标主机和投放文件。

rules.title: PowerShell Copy-Item to remote admin share
rules.titleZh: PowerShell Copy-Item 写入远程管理共享
rules.summary: A PowerShell command copied an executable or script to a remote ADMIN$ or C$ share, a common staging step before remote service, task, or WMI execution.
rules.summaryZh: PowerShell 命令将可执行/脚本复制到远程 ADMIN$ 或 C$ 管理共享，常见于远程服务、计划任务或 WMI 执行前的投放阶段。

rules.title: PowerShell web download followed by execution
rules.titleZh: PowerShell Web 下载后立即执行
rules.summary: A PowerShell command used Invoke-WebRequest, iwr, wget, curl, or WebClient download syntax, wrote into a user-writable path, and invoked Start-Process, Invoke-Item, or direct execution.
rules.summaryZh: PowerShell 命令使用 Invoke-WebRequest/iwr/wget/curl/WebClient 下载到用户可写路径，并通过 Start-Process、Invoke-Item 或直接调用执行；排查下载 URL、落地路径和父进程。

rules.title: BITS notify command executes staged payload
rules.titleZh: BITS notify 命令执行暂存载荷
rules.summary: A BITSAdmin or BITS PowerShell command configured a notification command line or completed transfer that points to a user-writable executable or script.
rules.summaryZh: BITSAdmin 或 BITS PowerShell 命令配置 notify command line，或完成后指向用户可写可执行/脚本载荷；排查 BITS 任务名、远程 URL 和本地路径。

rules.title: Browser credential database copied by command line
rules.titleZh: 命令行复制浏览器凭据数据库
rules.summary: A command line copied Chromium or Edge credential stores such as Login Data, Cookies, Web Data, or Local State into a staging path.
rules.summaryZh: 命令行复制 Chromium/Edge 的 Login Data、Cookies、Web Data 或 Local State 到暂存路径；这是浏览器凭据/会话数据访问的高优先级证据。
commandLineRegex: (?=.*\b(?:copy|xcopy|robocopy|Copy-Item|cp|type)\b)(?=.*(?:Chrome\\User Data|Edge\\User Data|User Data\\Default|User Data\\Profile))(?=.*(?:Login Data|Cookies|Web Data|Local State))(?=.*(?:AppData|ProgramData|Users\\Public|Downloads|Windows\\Temp|Desktop|Documents))

rules.title: MiniDumpWriteDump targeting LSASS
rules.titleZh: MiniDumpWriteDump 目标为 LSASS
rules.summary: API telemetry reported MiniDumpWriteDump, RtlCaptureContext, or dump creation targeting lsass.exe or an LSASS-like process context.
rules.summaryZh: API 遥测报告 MiniDumpWriteDump、RtlCaptureContext 或 dump 创建目标为 lsass.exe/LSASS 语境；排查 dump 文件路径、调用进程和是否随后压缩/上传。

rules.title: Credential-themed files archived for staging
rules.titleZh: 凭据主题文件被压缩暂存
rules.summary: A command line used archive tooling over user-profile or public paths while referencing credential, wallet, token, browser, SSH key, or certificate filenames.
rules.summaryZh: 命令行使用压缩工具处理用户目录或公共目录，并引用 credential、wallet、token、browser、SSH key 或证书类文件名；排查是否准备外传。

rules.title: Large authenticated HTTP upload metadata
rules.titleZh: 带认证信息的大体量 HTTP 上传元数据
rules.summary: HTTP or PCAP metadata reported POST/PUT upload traffic with authorization, cookie, bearer token, password, or explicit exfil labels and a large outbound body size.
rules.summaryZh: HTTP 或 PCAP 元数据报告 POST/PUT 上传，包含 Authorization、Cookie、Bearer token、password 或 exfil 标签，并带有较大出站 body；排查目标域名、路径和载荷大小。

rules.title: DNS base64-like high-entropy label exfiltration
rules.titleZh: DNS Base64 风格高熵标签外传
rules.summary: DNS or PCAP telemetry reported a long base64/base32-like query label together with high entropy or long-query metadata, consistent with DNS tunneling or exfiltration.
rules.summaryZh: DNS 或 PCAP 遥测报告长 Base64/Base32 风格查询标签，并伴随高熵或长查询元数据，符合 DNS 隧道/外传形态；排查查询域、标签长度和请求频率。

rules.title: TLS risky new-domain or C2 JA3 metadata
rules.titleZh: TLS 新注册风险域名或 C2 JA3 元数据
rules.summary: TLS or PCAP metadata paired a young domain, suspicious reputation, rare JA3, or C2 classification with TLS SNI/certificate fields.
rules.summaryZh: TLS 或 PCAP 元数据将新注册域名、可疑信誉、罕见 JA3 或 C2 分类与 SNI/证书字段关联；用于补强 TLS 侧 C2 线索，需结合进程和流量上下文判断。

rules.title: SMB svcctl named-pipe service execution metadata
rules.titleZh: SMB svcctl 命名管道服务执行元数据
rules.summary: SMB/PCAP metadata reported svcctl named-pipe traffic with service creation/start operations or executable service image metadata.
rules.summaryZh: SMB/PCAP 元数据报告 svcctl 命名管道流量，并伴随服务创建/启动操作或可执行服务镜像字段；排查是否为 PsExec/远程服务执行链。

rules.title: DCOM MMC20 remote command execution
rules.titleZh: DCOM MMC20 远程命令执行
rules.summary: A process command line used DCOM-style MMC20/ShellWindows automation with a remote target and command interpreter payload.
rules.summaryZh: 进程命令行使用 DCOM MMC20/ShellWindows 自动化、远程目标和命令解释器载荷；用于补强无文件远程管理/横向移动证据。

rules.title: Remote service control via sc.exe
rules.titleZh: 通过 sc.exe 远程控制服务
rules.summary: A command line used sc.exe against a remote host to start, stop, delete, configure, or otherwise control a service.
rules.summaryZh: 命令行使用 sc.exe 面向远程主机启动、停止、删除、配置或控制服务；属于远程服务管理和横向移动排查线索，需结合投放/认证证据判断。

rules.title: WScript or CScript executes remote script URL
rules.titleZh: WScript/CScript 执行远程脚本 URL
rules.summary: A Windows Script Host process executed or staged a script from an HTTP(S) URL or web cache path.
rules.summaryZh: Windows Script Host 进程从 HTTP(S) URL 或 Web 缓存路径执行/暂存脚本；常见于下载执行和脚本化载荷启动链。

rules.title: Downloaded artifact hash launched
rules.titleZh: 下载产物哈希随后被执行
rules.summary: A normalized download-execute correlation row tied an HTTP(S) source URL to a launched user-writable artifact with matching hash metadata.
rules.summaryZh: 归一化下载执行关联行将 HTTP(S) 来源 URL、用户可写执行路径和匹配哈希元数据关联起来；比单独 URL 或文件写入更适合作为报告主证据。

rules.title: Low-resource sandbox gate before exit or delay
rules.titleZh: 低资源沙箱门控后退出或延迟
rules.summary: Anti-analysis telemetry combined low CPU and memory thresholds with an explicit exit, delay, or gate action.
rules.summaryZh: 反分析遥测同时包含低 CPU/内存阈值和明确的退出、延迟或门控动作；避免把普通系统信息采集直接提升为高危行为。

rules.title: Sleep acceleration ratio mismatch
rules.titleZh: Sleep 加速比例异常
rules.summary: Sleep/timing telemetry reported a long requested delay but a much shorter observed wait together with acceleration, fast-forward, or time-skew labels.
rules.summaryZh: Sleep/计时遥测报告较长请求延迟但实际等待很短，并带有加速、快进或时间偏移标签；用于识别按时间逃避沙箱的门控逻辑。

rules.title: Remote thread starts in RWX memory
rules.titleZh: 远程线程从 RWX 内存启动
rules.summary: Thread telemetry reported CreateRemoteThread/NtCreateThreadEx with target process context, start address, and executable writable memory protection.
rules.summaryZh: 线程遥测报告 CreateRemoteThread/NtCreateThreadEx，同时包含目标进程、启动地址和可执行可写内存保护；这是强注入证据。

rules.title: Executable unbacked section mapped into process
rules.titleZh: 可执行匿名 Section 映射到进程
rules.summary: Memory/API telemetry reported NtMapViewOfSection or section-map behavior with executable protection and anonymous, pagefile, transacted, or otherwise unbacked mapping context.
rules.summaryZh: 内存/API 遥测报告 NtMapViewOfSection/section map 行为，同时包含可执行权限和匿名、pagefile、事务或无文件映射上下文；用于识别 section-based 注入。

rules.title: Domain-fronting TLS/HTTP correlation with risky JA3
rules.titleZh: Domain fronting 与高风险 JA3 关联
rules.summary: Network metadata correlated Host/SNI mismatch or domain-fronting classification with SNI, Host, and suspicious JA3 reputation fields.
rules.summaryZh: 网络元数据将 Host/SNI 不一致或 domain fronting 分类与 SNI、Host 和可疑 JA3 信誉字段关联；比单独 fronting 标签更适合作为 C2 证据。

rules.title: Beacon timing tied to SNI, JA3, and user-writable process
rules.titleZh: Beacon 周期与 SNI、JA3、用户可写进程关联
rules.summary: Flow or TLS metadata tied periodic C2/beacon timing, risky JA3 reputation, SNI, and a user-writable process path into one correlation row.
rules.summaryZh: 流量或 TLS 元数据在同一关联行中包含周期性 C2/beacon 时间、风险 JA3 信誉、SNI 和用户可写进程路径；这是报告中可直接展开的强 C2 证据。

rules.title: PowerShell profile persistence in user profile
rules.titleZh: 用户配置文件中的 PowerShell Profile 持久化
rules.summary: A file write targeted a user PowerShell profile script under Documents\WindowsPowerShell or Documents\PowerShell, an autostart surface for interactive shells.
rules.summaryZh: 文件写入指向用户 Documents 下的 PowerShell profile 脚本，这是交互式 PowerShell 启动时会加载的持久化面。

rules.title: Logon script points to user-writable payload
rules.titleZh: 登录脚本指向用户可写载荷
rules.summary: Registry or policy telemetry referenced a Windows logon script location together with a user-writable executable or script payload path.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表或策略遥测引用 Windows 登录脚本位置，并包含用户可写目录中的可执行或脚本载荷路径。

rules.title: Screensaver autostart points to user-writable payload
rules.titleZh: 屏幕保护程序自启动指向用户可写载荷
rules.summary: A registry write changed SCRNSAVE.EXE or nearby desktop screensaver settings to a user-writable SCR/EXE path.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表写入将 SCRNSAVE.EXE 或相邻屏保设置改为用户可写目录中的 SCR/EXE 路径。

rules.title: SetWindowsHookEx loads user-writable DLL
rules.titleZh: SetWindowsHookEx 加载用户可写 DLL
rules.summary: Runtime API telemetry reported SetWindowsHookEx/NtUserSetWindowsHookEx with a hook module path under a user-writable directory.
rules.summaryZh: 运行时 API 遥测报告 SetWindowsHookEx/NtUserSetWindowsHookEx，并带有用户可写目录中的 hook 模块路径。

rules.title: Thread context hijacking sequence
rules.titleZh: 线程上下文劫持序列
rules.summary: A summarized runtime row recorded SuspendThread/GetThreadContext/SetThreadContext/ResumeThread against a target process or thread.
rules.summaryZh: 汇总运行时行记录了对目标进程或线程的 SuspendThread/GetThreadContext/SetThreadContext/ResumeThread 序列。

rules.title: Module stomping write and execute transition
rules.titleZh: 模块覆盖写入并转为可执行
rules.summary: Memory telemetry reported writes into an image-backed module followed by executable protection or module-stomping classification.
rules.summaryZh: 内存遥测报告写入 image-backed 模块，并随后出现可执行保护或 module stomping 分类。

rules.title: WMI remote process create with explicit credentials
rules.titleZh: 带显式凭据的 WMI 远程进程创建
rules.summary: A WMIC command used remote node and credential switches with process call create, indicating remote execution setup rather than local discovery.
rules.summaryZh: WMIC 命令同时使用远程节点、凭据开关和 process call create，表示远程执行准备，而非本地发现。

rules.title: Remote scheduled task create or run with credentials
rules.titleZh: 带凭据的远程计划任务创建或运行
rules.summary: A schtasks command targeted a remote host with /S plus /U or /P and created, changed, or ran a task.
rules.summaryZh: schtasks 命令使用 /S 指向远程主机，并带有 /U 或 /P 创建、修改或运行任务。

rules.title: RDP RestrictedAdmin registry enablement
rules.titleZh: RDP RestrictedAdmin 注册表启用
rules.summary: Registry telemetry enabled DisableRestrictedAdmin=0, which can support credential-safe or pass-the-hash RDP lateral movement workflows.
rules.summaryZh: 注册表遥测将 DisableRestrictedAdmin 设置为 0，可支撑凭据安全或 pass-the-hash 风格的 RDP 横向移动流程。

rules.title: Debugger detected before exit or delay gate
rules.titleZh: 检测到调试器后退出或延迟门控
rules.summary: Anti-analysis telemetry combined debugger-check APIs or labels with an exit, terminate, sleep, or gate action.
rules.summaryZh: 反分析遥测将调试器检测 API 或标签与退出、终止、休眠或门控动作结合。

rules.title: Low user-interaction gate before exit
rules.titleZh: 低用户交互退出门控
rules.summary: User-interaction telemetry reported a low idle/input threshold together with an exit, terminate, delay, or gate action.
rules.summaryZh: 用户交互遥测报告较低空闲/输入阈值，并同时出现退出、终止、延迟或门控动作。

rules.title: VM artifact check tied to long sleep gate
rules.titleZh: VM 痕迹检查关联长休眠门控
rules.summary: Anti-sandbox telemetry combined VM/vendor artifact checks with a long requested sleep or delay gate.
rules.summaryZh: 反沙箱遥测将 VM/厂商痕迹检查与长时间请求休眠或延迟门控结合。

rules.title: Msiexec remote package execution
rules.titleZh: Msiexec 远程安装包执行
rules.summary: A msiexec command line installed or executed a remote MSI/MSP/CAB package over HTTP or HTTPS.
rules.summaryZh: msiexec 命令行通过 HTTP/HTTPS 安装或执行远程 MSI/MSP/CAB 包。

rules.title: Curl or Wget download chained to execution
rules.titleZh: Curl/Wget 下载后链式执行
rules.summary: A curl or wget command downloaded remote content into a user-writable executable or script path and chained to shell execution in the same command line.
rules.summaryZh: curl/wget 命令将远程内容下载到用户可写的可执行或脚本路径，并在同一命令行中链式执行。

rules.title: HTTP MZ payload launch correlation
rules.titleZh: HTTP MZ 载荷启动关联
rules.summary: A normalized download-execute correlation row tied an HTTP(S) source URL, MZ/PE payload magic, and a user-writable executed path.
rules.summaryZh: 规范化下载执行关联行将 HTTP(S) 来源 URL、MZ/PE 载荷魔数与用户可写执行路径关联。

rules.title: Granular static download-execute capability
rules.titleZh: 结构化静态下载执行能力
rules.summary: Granular static import, string, or YARA-like rows flagged download-execute capability fields. This remains static triage until runtime transfer or launch evidence appears.
rules.summaryZh: 结构化静态导入、字符串或 YARA-like 行标记下载执行能力字段；在出现运行时传输或启动证据前仅作为静态分诊。

rules.title: Granular static process-injection capability
rules.titleZh: 结构化静态进程注入能力
rules.summary: Granular static rows flagged process-injection API clusters or capability fields. This is import/string triage, not observed injection.
rules.summaryZh: 结构化静态行标记进程注入 API 集群或能力字段；这是导入/字符串分诊，不代表已观察到注入。

rules.title: Granular static anti-debug capability
rules.titleZh: 结构化静态反调试能力
rules.summary: Granular static rows flagged anti-debug or anti-analysis capability fields. This is static triage and should not be promoted without runtime gating evidence.
rules.summaryZh: 结构化静态行标记反调试或反分析能力字段；这是静态分诊，没有运行时门控证据时不应提升。

rules.title: DoH request carries high-entropy DNS query metadata
rules.titleZh: DoH 请求携带高熵 DNS 查询元数据
rules.summary: HTTP/PCAP metadata identified a DNS-over-HTTPS endpoint and included high-entropy or long-query DNS metadata.
rules.summaryZh: HTTP/PCAP 元数据识别 DNS-over-HTTPS 端点，并包含高熵或长查询 DNS 元数据。

rules.title: DNS fast-flux style low-TTL multi-answer response
rules.titleZh: DNS fast-flux 风格低 TTL 多应答
rules.summary: DNS or PCAP metadata reported fast-flux classification or many answers together with low TTL values.
rules.summaryZh: DNS 或 PCAP 元数据报告 fast-flux 分类，或多应答并伴随低 TTL 值。

rules.title: HTTP CONNECT tunnel with C2 or proxy classification
rules.titleZh: 带 C2/代理分类的 HTTP CONNECT 隧道
rules.summary: HTTP or PCAP metadata reported a CONNECT tunnel with proxy, tunnel, or C2 classification fields.
rules.summaryZh: HTTP 或 PCAP 元数据报告 CONNECT 隧道，并包含代理、隧道或 C2 分类字段。

rules.title: ECH/ESNI TLS with risky JA3 and no SNI
rules.titleZh: 无 SNI 且 JA3 高风险的 ECH/ESNI TLS
rules.summary: TLS metadata reported encrypted-client-hello or ESNI, no SNI, a JA3 fingerprint, and risky JA3 reputation/classification.
rules.summaryZh: TLS 元数据报告 ECH/ESNI、缺失 SNI、JA3 指纹以及高风险 JA3 信誉或分类。

rules.title: R0 semantic Run-key persistence candidate
rules.titleZh: R0 语义 Run Key 持久化候选
rules.summary: Parsed R0 registry telemetry reported persistenceFamily=autorun-run-key and startupRegistryCandidate=true for a registry write/create event.
rules.summaryZh: 解析后的 R0 注册表遥测在写入/创建事件中报告 persistenceFamily=autorun-run-key 且 startupRegistryCandidate=true。

rules.title: R0 semantic service persistence candidate
rules.titleZh: R0 语义服务持久化候选
rules.summary: Parsed R0 registry telemetry reported servicePersistenceCandidate=true with service-configuration persistence family.
rules.summaryZh: 解析后的 R0 注册表遥测报告 servicePersistenceCandidate=true，并归类为 service-configuration 持久化族。

rules.title: R0 semantic IFEO debugger persistence candidate
rules.titleZh: R0 语义 IFEO Debugger 持久化候选
rules.summary: Parsed R0 registry telemetry reported ifeoPersistenceCandidate=true with an IFEO debugger persistence family.
rules.summaryZh: 解析后的 R0 注册表遥测报告 ifeoPersistenceCandidate=true，并归类为 IFEO debugger 持久化族。

rules.title: R0 semantic startup-folder dropped file
rules.titleZh: R0 语义启动目录释放文件
rules.summary: Parsed R0 file telemetry reported a dropped-file candidate in the Startup folder family.
rules.summaryZh: 解析后的 R0 文件遥测报告启动目录族中的 dropped-file 候选。

rules.title: R0 semantic user-writable dropped-file candidate
rules.titleZh: R0 语义用户可写释放文件候选
rules.summary: Parsed R0 file telemetry reported droppedFileCandidate=true in Temp, ProgramData, Public, or another writable drop-location family.
rules.summaryZh: 解析后的 R0 文件遥测在 Temp、ProgramData、Public 或其他可写落地位置报告 droppedFileCandidate=true。

rules.title: R0 semantic user-writable image injection candidate
rules.titleZh: R0 语义用户可写镜像注入候选
rules.summary: Parsed R0 image-load telemetry reported imageLoadFamily=user-writable-image and injectionCandidate=true.
rules.summaryZh: 解析后的 R0 镜像加载遥测报告 imageLoadFamily=user-writable-image 且 injectionCandidate=true。

rules.title: R0 semantic lateral-movement network flow
rules.titleZh: R0 语义横向移动网络流
rules.summary: Parsed R0 network telemetry reported networkEvidenceKind=lateral-movement-flow and lateralMovementCandidate=true for SMB/RPC/RDP/WinRM-style ports.
rules.summaryZh: 解析后的 R0 网络遥测在 SMB/RPC/RDP/WinRM 等端口上报告 networkEvidenceKind=lateral-movement-flow 且 lateralMovementCandidate=true。

rules.title: R0 semantic web flow download-execute candidate
rules.titleZh: R0 语义 Web 流下载执行候选
rules.summary: Parsed R0 network telemetry reported an HTTP/TLS flow with downloadExecuteCandidate=true. Treat as web-transfer triage until paired with file/process execution evidence.
rules.summaryZh: 解析后的 R0 网络遥测报告 HTTP/TLS 流且 downloadExecuteCandidate=true；在与文件/进程执行证据配对前作为 Web 传输分诊。

rules.title: R0 semantic DNS flow observed
rules.titleZh: R0 语义 DNS 流
rules.summary: Parsed R0 network telemetry reported networkEvidenceKind=dns-flow. This is DNS semantic evidence for correlation with PCAP/DNS rows, not C2 by itself.
rules.summaryZh: 解析后的 R0 网络遥测报告 networkEvidenceKind=dns-flow；这是用于关联 PCAP/DNS 行的 DNS 语义证据，单独不代表 C2。

rules.title: R0 semantic dropped-file with download-execute hint
rules.titleZh: R0 语义释放文件带下载执行提示
rules.summary: A parsed file row includes both droppedFileCandidate=true and downloadExecuteCandidate=true, indicating the collector correlated or projected a web-transfer/drop context on one row.
rules.summaryZh: 解析后的文件行同时包含 droppedFileCandidate=true 和 downloadExecuteCandidate=true，表示采集器在同一行关联或投射了 Web 传输/落地上下文。

rules.title: Memory dump artifact tied to process identity
rules.titleZh: 内存转储产物关联到进程身份
rules.summary: A host-indexed memory dump artifact preserves a captured memory-dump source event, process identity, size, hash, and safe relative artifact selector for analyst correlation. This is artifact evidence, not a credential-dumping verdict by itself.
rules.summaryZh: Host 索引的内存转储产物保留了已捕获的内存转储来源事件、进程身份、大小、哈希和安全相对产物选择器，便于分析关联；它本身不是凭据转储判定。

rules.title: Dropped executable artifact tied to source event
rules.titleZh: 释放的可执行产物关联到来源事件
rules.summary: A host-indexed dropped-file artifact links an executable, script, library, driver, or archive payload under artifacts/dropped-files to the original file event, hash, and safe download selector.
rules.summaryZh: Host 索引的释放文件产物将 artifacts/dropped-files 下的可执行、脚本、库、驱动或归档载荷与原始文件事件、哈希和安全下载选择器关联。

rules.title: Screenshot artifact tied to capture event
rules.titleZh: 截图产物关联到捕获事件
rules.summary: A host-indexed screenshot artifact preserves the captured screenshot source event, phase, size, hash, and safe relative artifact selector for report review. This records sandbox collection evidence rather than sample screen-capture behavior.
rules.summaryZh: Host 索引的截图产物保留截图来源事件、阶段、大小、哈希和安全相对产物选择器用于报告审阅；这记录的是沙箱采集证据，而不是样本截图行为。

rules.title: PCAP protocol row tied to capture artifact
rules.titleZh: PCAP 协议行关联到抓包产物
rules.summary: A packet-derived flow, DNS, HTTP, TLS, or summary row carries packet-capture artifact path, hash, collection, and protocol metadata so protocol evidence can be traced back to a concrete PCAP/PCAPNG file.
rules.summaryZh: 包解析得到的流、DNS、HTTP、TLS 或摘要行携带抓包产物路径、哈希、collection 和协议元数据，使协议证据可追溯到具体 PCAP/PCAPNG 文件。

rules.title: User-writable process-tree descendant with lineage
rules.titleZh: 带谱系的用户可写路径进程树子进程
rules.summary: A process-tree row shows a descendant process executing from a user-writable payload path with root, parent, depth, and lineage fields present, reducing ambiguity compared with a standalone process path.
rules.summaryZh: 进程树行显示子孙进程从用户可写载荷路径执行，并包含 root、parent、depth 和 lineage 字段，相比单独进程路径更少歧义。

rules.title: VirusTotal found result persisted
rules.titleZh: VirusTotal 已收录结果已持久化
rules.summary: VirusTotal enrichment returned a found result for a SHA-256 and exposed provider counts plus a permalink. This confirms external enrichment coverage only; verdict-specific rules carry malicious or suspicious scoring.
rules.summaryZh: VirusTotal 富化对 SHA-256 返回已收录结果，并暴露引擎计数和永久链接；这仅确认外部富化覆盖，恶意或可疑评分由判定专用规则承担。

rules.title: SilentProcessExit MonitorProcess points to user-writable payload
rules.titleZh: SilentProcessExit MonitorProcess 指向用户可写载荷
rules.summary: A SilentProcessExit MonitorProcess registry value was written with an executable or script path in a user-writable location, a constrained IFEO persistence pattern.
rules.summaryZh: SilentProcessExit 的 MonitorProcess 注册表值被写入用户可写位置中的可执行或脚本路径，这是受约束的 IFEO 持久化模式。

rules.title: Print processor registry driver points to user-writable DLL
rules.titleZh: Print Processor 注册表驱动指向用户可写 DLL
rules.summary: A Print Processors registry Driver value references a DLL under a user-writable directory, reducing false positives from normal print configuration enumeration.
rules.summaryZh: Print Processors 注册表 Driver 值引用用户可写目录下的 DLL，可减少正常打印配置枚举造成的误报。

rules.title: Winsock provider catalog references user-writable DLL
rules.titleZh: Winsock Provider Catalog 引用用户可写 DLL
rules.summary: A Winsock provider catalog write carries a provider/library path under a user-writable directory, a constrained network-triggered persistence signal.
rules.summaryZh: Winsock provider catalog 写入携带用户可写目录下的 provider/library 路径，是受约束的网络触发持久化信号。

rules.title: Early-bird APC sequence into suspended target process
rules.titleZh: 面向挂起目标进程的 Early-bird APC 序列
rules.summary: Thread or API telemetry contains the same-field sequence CREATE_SUSPENDED, QueueUserAPC, and ResumeThread with target process/thread context.
rules.summaryZh: 线程或 API 遥测在同一字段中包含 CREATE_SUSPENDED、QueueUserAPC 和 ResumeThread 序列，并带有目标进程/线程上下文。

rules.title: Delete-pending image mutation before process creation
rules.titleZh: 进程创建前出现 delete-pending 镜像变形
rules.summary: File/process telemetry correlates image overwrite or delete-pending mutation with process creation from a user-writable image path.
rules.summaryZh: 文件/进程遥测将镜像覆盖或 delete-pending 变形与来自用户可写镜像路径的进程创建关联起来。

rules.title: WinRM WSMan remote shell command over HTTP
rules.titleZh: 通过 HTTP 的 WinRM WSMan 远程 Shell 命令
rules.summary: HTTP/PCAP metadata shows a WSMan POST to a WinRM port with CreateShell or Command SOAP action evidence.
rules.summaryZh: HTTP/PCAP 元数据显示发往 WinRM 端口的 WSMan POST，并包含 CreateShell 或 Command SOAP action 证据。

rules.title: SMB ATSVC named pipe remote task registration
rules.titleZh: SMB ATSVC 命名管道远程任务注册
rules.summary: SMB or driver network telemetry reports the ATSVC named pipe with remote scheduled-task registration or legacy job-add operation context.
rules.summaryZh: SMB 或驱动网络遥测报告 ATSVC 命名管道，并带有远程计划任务注册或旧式 job-add 操作上下文。

rules.title: TSCON RDP session switch from elevated context
rules.titleZh: 高权限上下文中的 TSCON RDP 会话切换
rules.summary: A tscon command switches a numbered session to console or rdp-tcp from an elevated or SYSTEM-like context, a constrained RDP session hijack indicator.
rules.summaryZh: tscon 命令在高权限或 SYSTEM 类上下文中将编号会话切换到 console/rdp-tcp，是受约束的 RDP 会话劫持指标。

rules.title: Firmware WMI VM check gates execution
rules.titleZh: 固件 WMI 虚拟机检查控制执行路径
rules.summary: A command probes BIOS, computer-system, baseboard, or SMBIOS WMI classes for VM vendor strings while the event records exit, sleep, or gate behavior.
rules.summaryZh: 命令探测 BIOS、ComputerSystem、BaseBoard 或 SMBIOS WMI 类中的虚拟机厂商字符串，同时事件记录退出、睡眠或门控行为。

rules.title: Short system uptime gates execution
rules.titleZh: 短系统运行时间控制执行路径
rules.summary: Anti-analysis telemetry records an uptime check below ten minutes combined with exit, terminate, sleep, delay, or gate behavior.
rules.summaryZh: 反分析遥测记录低于十分钟的 uptime 检查，并伴随退出、终止、睡眠、延迟或门控行为。

rules.title: Downloaded disk image or archive launches LNK/script payload
rules.titleZh: 下载的磁盘镜像或压缩包启动 LNK/脚本载荷
rules.summary: A normalized download-execute row ties a user-downloaded ISO/IMG/VHD/archive container to execution of an LNK, executable, or script payload.
rules.summaryZh: 规范化 download-execute 行将用户下载的 ISO/IMG/VHD/压缩包容器与 LNK、可执行文件或脚本载荷的执行关联起来。

rules.title: Script interpreter launched Mark-of-the-Web download
rules.titleZh: 脚本解释器启动带 Mark-of-the-Web 的下载文件
rules.summary: A script interpreter or LOLBin command executes a user-downloaded script/HTA/LNK with Zone.Identifier evidence instead of relying on a bare command substring.
rules.summaryZh: 脚本解释器或 LOLBin 命令执行带 Zone.Identifier 证据的用户下载脚本/HTA/LNK，而不是仅依赖宽泛命令子串。

rules.title: WebSocket upgrade with non-browser automation user agent
rules.titleZh: 带非浏览器自动化 User-Agent 的 WebSocket Upgrade
rules.summary: HTTP metadata shows a WebSocket upgrade to a concrete host/URI from a scripting, CLI, or automation user agent often used by implants.
rules.summaryZh: HTTP 元数据显示来自脚本、CLI 或自动化 User-Agent 的 WebSocket upgrade，且包含具体 host/URI，常见于植入体通信。

rules.title: DoH POST carrying high-entropy DNS query payload
rules.titleZh: DoH POST 携带高熵 DNS 查询载荷
rules.summary: HTTP/PCAP metadata records a DNS-over-HTTPS POST to /dns-query with DNS message content and an unusually long or encoded query payload.
rules.summaryZh: HTTP/PCAP 元数据记录发往 /dns-query 的 DNS-over-HTTPS POST，具有 DNS message 内容类型和异常长或编码的查询载荷。

rules.title: Mutual TLS client certificate with rare or suspicious JA3
rules.titleZh: 带罕见或可疑 JA3 的双向 TLS 客户端证书
rules.summary: TLS metadata shows a client certificate plus concrete SNI/JA3 context where the JA3 reputation is rare, suspicious, malicious, or C2-labeled.
rules.summaryZh: TLS 元数据显示客户端证书以及具体 SNI/JA3 上下文，且 JA3 声誉为罕见、可疑、恶意或 C2 标记。
